canvas.html:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>pyre</title>
<style>
* { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }
body { 
  background: #000; 
  overflow: hidden; 
  cursor: crosshair;
}
canvas { display: block; }
</style>
</head>
<body>
<canvas id="c"></canvas>
<script>
const canvas = document.getElementById('c');
const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');

let W, H;
function resize() {
  W = canvas.width = window.innerWidth;
  H = canvas.height = window.innerHeight;
}
resize();
window.addEventListener('resize', resize);

// Audio context for crackling
let audioCtx, noiseNode, gainNode, filterNode;
let audioStarted = false;

function initAudio() {
  if (audioStarted) return;
  audioStarted = true;
  
  audioCtx = new (window.AudioContext || window.webkitAudioContext)();
  
  // Create noise buffer
  const bufferSize = audioCtx.sampleRate * 2;
  const noiseBuffer = audioCtx.createBuffer(1, bufferSize, audioCtx.sampleRate);
  const output = noiseBuffer.getChannelData(0);
  for (let i = 0; i < bufferSize; i++) {
    output[i] = Math.random() * 2 - 1;
  }
  
  noiseNode = audioCtx.createBufferSource();
  noiseNode.buffer = noiseBuffer;
  noiseNode.loop = true;
  
  // Bandpass filter for crackle character
  filterNode = audioCtx.createBiquadFilter();
  filterNode.type = 'bandpass';
  filterNode.frequency.value = 800;
  filterNode.Q.value = 0.5;
  
  // Gain for volume control
  gainNode = audioCtx.createGain();
  gainNode.gain.value = 0;
  
  // Crackle modulation
  const crackleMod = audioCtx.createGain();
  
  noiseNode.connect(filterNode);
  filterNode.connect(gainNode);
  gainNode.connect(audioCtx.destination);
  
  noiseNode.start();
}

// Mouse state
let mouse = { x: W / 2, y: H / 2 };
let mouseActive = false;

canvas.addEventListener('mousemove', e => {
  mouse.x = e.clientX;
  mouse.y = e.clientY;
  mouseActive = true;
});

canvas.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => {
  mouseActive = false;
});

canvas.addEventListener('click', e => {
  initAudio();
  // Spawn burst of fire at click point
  for (let i = 0; i < 50; i++) {
    spawnParticle(e.clientX, e.clientY, true);
  }
});

canvas.addEventListener('touchstart', e => {
  initAudio();
  const touch = e.touches[0];
  for (let i = 0; i < 50; i++) {
    spawnParticle(touch.clientX, touch.clientY, true);
  }
});

// Fire particles
const particles = [];
const MAX_PARTICLES = 2000;

class Particle {
  constructor(x, y, isBurst = false) {
    this.x = x;
    this.y = y;
    this.vx = (Math.random() - 0.5) * (isBurst ? 8 : 2);
    this.vy = -Math.random() * (isBurst ? 12 : 4) - 2;
    this.heat = 1.0 + (isBurst ? 0.5 : 0);
    this.life = 1.0;
    this.decay = 0.008 + Math.random() * 0.012;
    this.size = 2 + Math.random() * 6;
    this.isEmber = Math.random() < 0.1;
    if (this.isEmber) {
      this.decay *= 0.5;
      this.size = 1 + Math.random() * 2;
    }
  }
  
  update(wind) {
    // Physics
    this.vy -= 0.15 * this.heat; // buoyancy
    this.vx += wind.x * 0.02;
    this.vy += wind.y * 0.01;
    
    // Turbulence
    this.vx += (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.5;
    this.vy += (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.3;
    
    // Damping
    this.vx *= 0.98;
    this.vy *= 0.98;
    
    this.x += this.vx;
    this.y += this.vy;
    
    // Cool down and die
    this.heat *= 0.995;
    this.life -= this.decay;
    
    return this.life > 0;
  }
  
  draw() {
    const alpha = this.life * 0.8;
    
    // Color based on heat: cyan core → pink → magenta → purple → smoke
    let r, g, b;
    if (this.heat > 0.8) {
      // Hot core: cyan-white
      r = 150 + 105 * this.heat;
      g = 240 + 15 * this.heat;
      b = 255;
    } else if (this.heat > 0.5) {
      // Mid: electric pink
      const t = (this.heat - 0.5) / 0.3;
      r = 255;
      g = 100 * t + 50;
      b = 200 + 55 * t;
    } else if (this.heat > 0.2) {
      // Cooler: magenta/purple
      const t = (this.heat - 0.2) / 0.3;
      r = 180 + 75 * t;
      g = 50 * t;
      b = 150 + 50 * t;
    } else {
      // Smoke: dark purple-gray
      const t = this.heat / 0.2;
      r = 80 + 100 * t;
      g = 40 + 10 * t;
      b = 100 + 50 * t;
    }
    
    const size = this.size * (0.5 + this.life * 0.5) * (1 + this.heat * 0.5);
    
    if (this.isEmber) {
      // Embers: bright specks
      ctx.beginPath();
      ctx.arc(this.x, this.y, size * 0.5, 0, Math.PI * 2);
      ctx.fillStyle = `rgba(255, 200, 255, ${alpha})`;
      ctx.fill();
    } else {
      // Fire: soft glow
      const gradient = ctx.createRadialGradient(
        this.x, this.y, 0,
        this.x, this.y, size
      );
      gradient.addColorStop(0, `rgba(${r}, ${g}, ${b}, ${alpha})`);
      gradient.addColorStop(0.4, `rgba(${r * 0.8}, ${g * 0.6}, ${b * 0.9}, ${alpha * 0.6})`);
      gradient.addColorStop(1, `rgba(${r * 0.5}, ${g * 0.3}, ${b * 0.7}, 0)`);
      
      ctx.beginPath();
      ctx.arc(this.x, this.y, size, 0, Math.PI * 2);
      ctx.fillStyle = gradient;
      ctx.fill();
    }
  }
}

function spawnParticle(x, y, isBurst = false) {
  if (particles.length < MAX_PARTICLES) {
    particles.push(new Particle(x, y, isBurst));
  }
}

// Fire sources at the bottom
const fireSources = [];
function initFireSources() {
  const numSources = 5;
  for (let i = 0; i < numSources; i++) {
    fireSources.push({
      x: W * (0.2 + 0.6 * i / (numSources - 1)),
      y: H - 50,
      intensity: 0.5 + Math.random() * 0.5,
      phase: Math.random() * Math.PI * 2
    });
  }
}
initFireSources();

let time = 0;

function animate() {
  // Fade trail
  ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15)';
  ctx.fillRect(0, 0, W, H);
  
  time += 0.016;
  
  // Calculate wind from mouse
  const wind = { x: 0, y: 0 };
  if (mouseActive) {
    const centerX = W / 2;
    const centerY = H / 2;
    wind.x = (mouse.x - centerX) / W * 15;
    wind.y = (mouse.y - centerY) / H * 5;
  }
  
  // Spawn from fire sources
  fireSources.forEach((src, i) => {
    // Flickering intensity
    const flicker = 0.7 + 0.3 * Math.sin(time * 5 + src.phase) * Math.sin(time * 7.3 + i);
    const spawnRate = Math.floor(src.intensity * flicker * 8);
    
    for (let j = 0; j < spawnRate; j++) {
      const offsetX = (Math.random() - 0.5) * 80;
      spawnParticle(src.x + offsetX, src.y + Math.random() * 20);
    }
  });
  
  // Update and draw particles
  let totalHeat = 0;
  for (let i = particles.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
    const alive = particles[i].update(wind);
    if (!alive) {
      particles.splice(i, 1);
    } else {
      particles[i].draw();
      totalHeat += particles[i].heat;
    }
  }
  
  // Update audio based on fire intensity
  if (audioStarted && gainNode) {
    const targetGain = Math.min(0.15, totalHeat / 500);
    gainNode.gain.value += (targetGain - gainNode.gain.value) * 0.1;
    
    // Modulate filter for crackling variation
    const crackle = 400 + 800 * Math.abs(Math.sin(time * 20)) * Math.random();
    filterNode.frequency.value = crackle;
  }
  
  // Draw glow at base
  fireSources.forEach(src => {
    const glowGradient = ctx.createRadialGradient(
      src.x, H, 0,
      src.x, H, 150
    );
    glowGradient.addColorStop(0, 'rgba(255, 100, 200, 0.3)');
    glowGradient.addColorStop(0.5, 'rgba(200, 50, 150, 0.1)');
    glowGradient.addColorStop(1, 'rgba(100, 0, 100, 0)');
    
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.arc(src.x, H, 150, 0, Math.PI * 2);
    ctx.fillStyle = glowGradient;
    ctx.fill();
  });
  
  // Subtle vignette
  const vignette = ctx.createRadialGradient(
    W / 2, H / 2, H * 0.3,
    W / 2, H / 2, H
  );
  vignette.addColorStop(0, 'rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)');
  vignette.addColorStop(1, 'rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.4)');
  ctx.fillStyle = vignette;
  ctx.fillRect(0, 0, W, H);
  
  requestAnimationFrame(animate);
}

animate();
</script>
</body>
</html>
